faqs.a: We recommend scheduling in advance, but we do our best to accommodate same-day emergency visits. Please call us and we'll fit you in as soon as possible.

faqs.q: What should I bring to my first appointment?
faqs.a: Please bring a valid photo ID, your insurance card, and any previous dental records if available. Arrive 10 minutes early to complete new patient paperwork.

faqs.q: How do I cancel or reschedule?
faqs.a: We ask for at least 24 hours notice to cancel or reschedule. You can call us or I can help you reschedule right now.
Yes, we offer CareCredit financing and in-house payment plans for larger treatments. Ask our front desk for details.
Yes, we have a free parking lot directly in front of the clinic.
Yes, we see patients of all ages, including children from age 3 and up.
